name: collect_experience
description: Parse the founder's professional experience into structured domain segments. Call after collecting interests to map the founder's background. Expects the founder's response about their work history and expertise areas.

response.description: The founder's natural-language response about their work history and expertise areas.

prior_experience.description: Previously collected experience segments to merge with or refine.

segments.description: Structured experience segments extracted from the response.

summary.description: A brief narrative summary of the founder's experience.

role.description: Role or function held in this domain.

years.description: Approximate years of experience in this domain.

insider_knowledge.description: Key insights or insider knowledge gained in this domain.
